62ec2b2977063e8d403f0762.leadin: In one film, a character played by this actor stabs and kills his bandmate Toledo after getting fired by their band leader. For 10 points each:
62ec2b2977063e8d403f0762.leadin_sanitized: In one film, a character played by this actor stabs and kills his bandmate Toledo after getting fired by their band leader. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this actor who tragically died in August 2020. The 2021 Oscars made the best actor award the last of the night in order to give it posthumously to this actor, making it really awkward when he didn’t win.
Boseman portrayed this title character of a 2018 Marvel movie in the Marvel Cinematic Universe. This king of Wakanda fights with a suit that can absorb and redistribute energy.

The relatively unknown Boseman broke through as an actor in 2013 when he starred as Jackie Robinson in this biopic. This film also stars Harrison Ford as Branch Rickey, the owner of the Brooklyn Dodgers.
parts_sanitized: Name this actor who tragically died in August 2020. The 2021 Oscars made the best actor award the last of the night in order to give it posthumously to this actor, making it really awkward when he didn't win.
Boseman portrayed this title character of a 2018 Marvel movie in the Marvel Cinematic Universe. This king of Wakanda fights with a suit that can absorb and redistribute energy.

The relatively unknown Boseman broke through as an actor in 2013 when he starred as Jackie Robinson in this biopic. This film also stars Harrison Ford as Branch Rickey, the owner of the Brooklyn Dodgers.
answers: Chadwick Boseman [or Chadwick Aaron Boseman] (The film in the lead-in is Ma Rainey’s Black Bottom.)
answers_sanitized: Chadwick Boseman [or Chadwick Aaron Boseman] (The film in the lead-in is Ma Rainey's Black Bottom.)

62ec2b2977063e8d403f0798.question: A kingdom in this region was dominated for a time by a faction known as the Sarim. That kingdom from this region was home to a research institute known as the Hall of Worthies and was dominated by an elite class known as the yangban. A military commander employed by a kingdom in this region designed so-called (*) “turtle ships” to counter the forces of Toyotomi Hideyoshi; that commander was Yi Sun-Sin. Sejong the Great ruled the kingdom of Joseon, which dominated this region for five centuries. For 10 points, name this region now split between two countries governed from Pyongyang and Seoul.
62ec2b2977063e8d403f0798.question_sanitized: A kingdom in this region was dominated for a time by a faction known as the Sarim. That kingdom from this region was home to a research institute known as the Hall of Worthies and was dominated by an elite class known as the yangban. A military commander employed by a kingdom in this region designed so-called (*) "turtle ships" to counter the forces of Toyotomi Hideyoshi; that commander was Yi Sun-Sin. Sejong the Great ruled the kingdom of Joseon, which dominated this region for five centuries. For 10 points, name this region now split between two countries governed from Pyongyang and Seoul.
62ec2b2977063e8d403f0798.answer: Korean peninsula [accept South Korea or Republic of Korea or North Korea or Democratic People’s Republic of Korea or Hanguk or Joseon]
62ec2b2977063e8d403f0798.answer_sanitized: Korean peninsula [accept South Korea or Republic of Korea or North Korea or Democratic People's Republic of Korea or Hanguk or Joseon]

62ec2b2977063e8d403f084f.leadin: In one novel, this author described “men without skin” who push “the woman with my face” into the sea in a stream-of-consciousness description of the Middle Passage. For 10 points each:
62ec2b2977063e8d403f084f.leadin_sanitized: In one novel, this author described "men without skin" who push "the woman with my face" into the sea in a stream-of-consciousness description of the Middle Passage. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this author. Another novel by this author begins with a passage from “Dick and Jane” which is repeated without punctuation and then again without spaces.

Morrison used corrupted Dick and Jane quotes as chapter headings in this 1970 novel. At the end of this novel, Soaphead Church tricks Pecola Breedlove into poisoning a dog to convince her that she has the title feature.

Morrison also wrote Beloved, which is about an escaped one of these people who kills her baby before she is recaptured. Robert Hayden’s poem “Middle Passage” describes a journey these people were forced to undertake.
parts_sanitized: Name this author. Another novel by this author begins with a passage from "Dick and Jane" which is repeated without punctuation and then again without spaces.

Morrison used corrupted Dick and Jane quotes as chapter headings in this 1970 novel. At the end of this novel, Soaphead Church tricks Pecola Breedlove into poisoning a dog to convince her that she has the title feature.

Morrison also wrote Beloved, which is about an escaped one of these people who kills her baby before she is recaptured. Robert Hayden's poem "Middle Passage" describes a journey these people were forced to undertake.
answers: slaves [or enslaved people; prompt on Africans or African-Americans or Black people]
answers_sanitized: slaves [or enslaved people; prompt on Africans or African-Americans or Black people]
